title: Magic Item
description: Magic items & potions, treated as a primitive family with an interaction matrix (stages-1-3-plan.md A8): attunement, activation timing, charges, consumable action-economy, and three mechanical hooks — +X via the modifier registry (`bonus` / `effect_primitives`), charges via feature-uses (`charges`), spell-granting via `casts`. See docs/srd/srd-coverage-audit.md §5. The mi_* content library is WS-A8.

id.description: Stable id; mi_ prefix + lowercase snake_case (e.g. mi_ring_of_protection, mi_potion_of_healing_greater).

attunement.description: Attunement gate (cap of 3 attuned items validated in PCSpec, plan §3.1). `requirement` is a free-text restriction fact (e.g. 'by a Spellcaster', 'by a Bard, Cleric, or Druid') when present.

consumable.description: True for one-shot items consumed on use (potions, scrolls, some wondrous items). Drives consumable action-economy scoring (plan A8).

activation.description: How the item is used in combat (drink a potion = action; command word; etc.). Reuses the shared activation shape.

charges.description: Charge pool (the feature_uses hook, plan A8). `max` charges; `recharge` describes daily/dawn recovery; `destroy_on_last_charge` for items that crumble (e.g. some staffs on the d20=1 rule).

bonus.description: Static +X bonuses applied via the modifier registry (plan A8). Any subset; e.g. Ring of Protection = { ac: 1, saving_throws: 1 }; a +2 weapon = { attack: 2, damage: 2 }.

casts.description: Spell-granting hook (plan A8; mirrors monster `casts`). Each entry references a built spell and how the item pays for it (charge cost, at-will, or per-day) and the save DC / attack used.

spell.description: sp_* spell id the item can cast.

fixed_level.description: Slot level the item casts the spell at, if fixed.

effect_primitives.description: The general mechanical hook — modifier-ride and on-event effects expressed as primitives (same vocabulary as features), for items whose effect isn't a simple `bonus` or `casts` (e.g. resistance grants, on-hit riders, condition immunity).

applies_to.description: For items that enhance a base item rather than stand alone (e.g. '+1 Armor', 'Armor of Resistance', 'Ammunition +1'). Names the base equipment kind and any restriction.

restriction.description: e.g. 'any Light, Medium, or Heavy', 'Battleaxe, Greataxe, or Halberd'.

aliases.description: Alternate internal names for content resolution (WS-I import matching).

public_name.description: PI-safe public display name override (WS-I rename layer, plan §3.8). The #1 use case for non-SRD popular items shipped in the public bundle.

stage4_stub.description: Namespaced Stage-4 extension blob (plan §3.10): item lore, sentience facts, crafting/curse flavor. No engine semantics; speculative data only.
